title: Markets Buoyed By Strong Chinese Imports
section_path: Markets Buoyed By Strong Chinese Imports
section_path_text: Markets Buoyed By Strong Chinese Imports
summary:
Main
Dovish commentary from central bankers triggered a risk-on tone across markets, aided by signs of strong demand in China. By Daniel Hynes
Gold extended its record-breaking rally amid further dovish commentary from central bankers. Federal Reserve Chair, Jerome Powell, told a Senate panel the Fed is not far from being confident enough to cut rates.
